scenarios.name: baseline — page renders with 4 KPI cards and 4 tabs

expected.notes: Read-only dashboard. Assert KPI strip + tab list render; default tab is Positions with a populated table.

scenarios.name: Positions tab — table renders staking-position rows

expected.notes: Positions tab is default. Assert the positions table shows multiple rows.

scenarios.name: Validators tab — switching tab swaps the visible table

expected.notes: Clicking Validators tab hides positions table and reveals validators table with rows.

scenarios.name: Rewards tab — shows monthly chart and reward history

expected.notes: Rewards tab renders the monthly-rewards chart card and the reward-history table with rows.

scenarios.name: Unstaking tab — Withdraw button disabled for Cooling Down rows

expected.notes: Cooling Down rows have their Withdraw button disabled; Ready to Withdraw rows enable it.
